phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra la focaccia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh DOH-veh see KOM-prah lah foh-KAHT-chah, pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al banco, proprio qui a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL BAHN-koh prohp-REE-oh KW-ee AH DEH-strah

responses.phonetic: AHL BAHN-koh prohp-REE-oh KW-ee AH DEH-strah
responses.local: Al banco, proprio qui a destra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa una focaccia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KWAN-toh KOS-tah OO-nah foh-KAHT-chah pehr fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è fresca oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh, eh FRES-kah OHJ-jee, per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it's fresh of the day.

responses.english: Yes, it's fresh of the day.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è possibile ordinare da asporto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh eh pos-SEE-bee-leh or-dee-NA-reh dah ah-SPOR-toh per fa-VO-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we do takeaway as well.

responses.english: Yes, we do takeaway as well.
